name: Sixgill Darkfeed
description: Sixgill's premium underground intelligence collection capabilities, real-time collection, and advanced warning about IOCs help you keep your edge against unknown threats

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Scheduled/Automated ingestion of all the new Darkfeed IOCs detected since the last ingestion

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Container IDs to limit the ingestion to

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for

actions.name: Enrich Ip
actions.description: Query the Sixgill Darkfeed for the specified IP and receive all the IOCs matching that IP

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: Enrich IP Address indicator with Sixgill Darkfeed

actions.name: Enrich Url
actions.description: Query the Sixgill Darkfeed for the specified URL and receive all the IOCs matching that URL

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Enrich URL indicator with Sixgill Darkfeed

actions.name: Enrich Domain
actions.description: Query the Sixgill Darkfeed for the specified domain and receive all the IOCs matching that domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Enrich Domain indicator with Sixgill Darkfeed

actions.name: Enrich Hash
actions.description: Query the Sixgill Darkfeed for the specified hash and receive all the IOCs matching that hash

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Enrich Hash indicator with Sixgill Darkfeed

actions.name: Enrich Post Id
actions.description: Query the Sixgill Darkfeed for the specified Sixgill Post ID (i.e. unique identifier of a specific post shared in the underground) and receive all the IOCs shared in that post

parameters.name: postid
parameters.description: Enrich Post ID with Sixgill Darkfeed

actions.name: Enrich Threat Actor
actions.description: Query the Sixgill Darkfeed for the specified threat actor and receive all the IOCs shared by that threat actor

parameters.name: actor
parameters.description: Enrich Actor indicator with Sixgill Darkfeed
